lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਕੜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu binasai naa ham karriaa |
lines.english: He does not perish, so I do not grieve.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਸੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਦੂਖੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa os dookh na ham kau dookhe |1|
lines.english: He is not in pain, so I do not suffer. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਭੂਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu niradhan naa ham bhookhe |
lines.english: He is not poor, so I do not hunger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਓਹੁ ਮਰਤਾ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਡਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naa ohu marataa naa ham ddariaa |
lines.english: He does not die, so I do not fear.
He is my very life, the Giver of life. ||1||Pause||
There is no other Destroyer than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਬੰਧਨ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਬਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa us bandhan naa ham baadhe |
lines.english: He is not bound, so I am not in bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਧੰਧਾ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਧਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: naa us dhandhaa naa ham dhaadhe |
lines.english: He has no occupation, so I have no entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਤ ਹਮ ਸਦ ਕੇਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: os anand ta ham sad kelaa |2|
lines.english: He is in ecstasy, so I am always happy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਮੈਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa us mail na ham kau mailaa |
lines.english: He has no impurities, so I have no impurities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਸੋਚੁ ਨ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਸੋਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa us soch na ham kau sochaa |
lines.english: He has no anxiety, so I have no cares.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa us bhookh na ham kau trisanaa |
lines.english: He has no hunger, so I have no thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਉਸੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਹਮ ਕਉ ਪੋਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa us lep na ham kau pochaa |
lines.english: He has no stain, so I have no pollution.
I am nothing; He is the One and only.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਉਹੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਤਾਂ ਹਮ ਜਚਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa uhu niramal taan ham jachanaa |3|
lines.english: Since He is immaculately pure, I correspond to Him. ||3||
Before and after, He alone exists.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, the Guru has taken away my doubts and mistakes;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਓਇ ਮਿਲਿ ਹੋਏ ਇਕ ਰੰਗਾ ॥੪॥੩੨॥੮੩॥
lines.translit: ham oe mil hoe ik rangaa |4|32|83|
lines.english: He and I, joining together, are of the same color. ||4||32||83||
Serve Him in many different ways;
Carry water for Him, and wave the fan over Him - renounce your ego.
Dedicate your soul, your breath of life and your wealth to Him.
Make yourself a sacrifice to Him, time and time again. ||1||
She alone is the happy soul-bride, who is pleasing to God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਉ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis kai sang milau meree maaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In her company, I may meet Him, O my mother. ||1||Pause||
By that good destiny inscribed upon my forehead, I obtain their society.
I am the water-carrier of the slaves of His slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਬਸੈ ਜੀਅ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: auna kee ren basai jeea naal |
lines.english: I treasure in my soul the dust of their feet.
Renouncing pride and attachment, I become the dust of the feet of the Saints.
Through His Love, the Lord Master meets me. ||2||
I dedicate all to Him - chanting and meditation, austerity and religious observances.
I offer all to Him - good actions, righteous conduct and incense burning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਦੇਖਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨੈਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang dekhau prabh nain |3|
lines.english: In their society, I behold God with my eyes. ||3||
Day and night, I serve Him like this.
Each and every moment, I contemplate and adore Him.
in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, He forgives us. ||4||33||84||
The Lord of the Universe, the Cherisher of the World, has become merciful;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet dukh lagai na koe |
lines.english: In the Love of God, one is not touched by pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet haumai mal khoe |
lines.english: In the Love of God, the filth of ego is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet sadaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: In the Love of God, eternal peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਘਟ ਘਟ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeea praan ghatt ghatt aadhaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: the Support of the soul, the breath of life, of each and every heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਦ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet sad niramal hoe |1|
lines.english: In the Love of God, one becomes forever immaculate. ||1||
Listen, O friend: show such love and affection to God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet ridai niramal naam |
lines.english: In the Love of God, the Immaculate Naam fills the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਭਏ ਸਗਲ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet bhe sagal nidhaan |
lines.english: In the Love of God, all treasures are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਭ ਮਿਟੀ ਹੈ ਚਿੰਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet sabh mittee hai chint |2|
lines.english: In the Love of God, all anxiety is ended. ||2||
In the Love of God, one is eternally embellished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਇਹੁ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet ihu bhavajal tarai |
lines.english: In the Love of God, one crosses over this terrible world-ocean.
The Love of God shall go along with you. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਜਮ ਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਡਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee preet jam te nahee ddarai |
lines.english: In the Love of God, one does not fear death.
In the Love of God, all are saved.
Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to You.
One who is blessed by God's Mercy, joins the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
By himself, no one is united, and no one goes astray.
O God, You are the Support and the Strength of the Saints. ||4||34||85||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
oppressing the people, he gathers wealth.
Becoming a king, the mortal wields his royal authority;
